**File**: `/testbed/inlong-sdk/transform-sdk/src/main/java/org/apache/inlong/sdk/transform/process/function/string/UrlEncodeFunction.java`

```sql
-- Using default UTF-8 (backward compatible)

-- Explicitly specifying UTF-8
